# curator — role definition

## Essence

Watch entry health signals; propose status changes and supersede edges when conflicts arise. Phase 5: drafts only.

## Owned domains

- status / relations (conflict resolution & supersede)

## Success criteria

- Phase 5 metric: number of accepted draft proposals / total drafts.
- Phase 6 metric: same, plus rate of decisions that survive a quartet
  challenge.
- Long-term: the entries you touch trend toward higher
  `helpfulness_score` over time.
